channel.title: phd curriculum on Ayush Subedi
channel.description: Recent content in phd curriculum on Ayush Subedi

item.title: Self Study Series: NLP (WIP)
item.description:
Self Study Series: NLP

Why NLP has made progress in strides recently?

  • Attention is all you need, published by a team of google researchers introduced the Transformer architecture, and crushed previous architectures that were based on RNNs
  • Availability of pre trained data
  • Model hubs like Hugging Face

Introduction to Transformer

Text Classification

Transformer Architecture

Token Classification Problem

Text Generation

Summarization

Question Answering

Production

Few to no Labels

Training Transformers from Scratch

Future Directions

item.title: Self Study Series: Optimization (WIP)
item.description:
Self Study Series: Optimization

Convex sets

Convex functions

Convex optimization problems

Duality

Approximation and fitting

Statistical estimation

Geometric problems

Unconstrained minimization

Equality constrained minimization

Interior point methods

Example with Pyomo

Modeling with Pyomo

item.title: Self Study Series: Pytorch (WIP)
item.description:
Self Study Series: Pytorch

Intro

  • Python library for deep learning computing created and released by Facebook
  • It has the capability to train a deep learning model and as well as run a model in inference mode.
  • Pytorch is a Python-based scientific computing package that serves two specific purposes:
    • replacement for NumPy to use the power of GPUs
    • designed for neural networks
  • Pytorch utilizes tensors. Tensors are generalizations of matrices to N-dimensional space

Simple MLP model

Training a PyTorch Model

Using a PyTorch Model for Inference

Loading Data from Torchvision

Using Pytorch DataLoader

Convolutional Neural Network

Train and Image Classifier

Train with GPUs
